disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reproducible cramping ache in the right calf brought on by walking a set distance and relieved by rest, present for about a year and gradually worsening
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any trouble with your legs when you walk?
Do you get any cramping or aching in your legs, and does it go away when you stop?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, for about a year now I get a cramp in my right calf after I walk a block or two, and it eases off if I stop and stand for a bit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning pain in the toes of the right foot when lying flat, relieved only by hanging the leg down over the side of the bed, for the past 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the pain in your foot.
What makes the foot pain better or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The toes burn like fire the moment I lie flat, and the only relief is hanging my leg off the bed. Lifting the leg up makes it much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: When the leg is raised the foot goes pale/white, and when it is lowered it turns a dark red or purple colour
trigger_question_examples: When you lift the leg up, does the colour of the foot change?
What colour does the foot go when you hang it down versus lift it up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it — when I lift it up it goes really pale, almost white, and when I hang it down it turns a dark reddish-purple.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The right foot feels cold to touch, the skin looks pale and shiny, and the hair has been lost over the toes
trigger_question_examples: How does the foot feel and look compared to the other one?
Is the foot cold, or does the skin look different?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's colder than the other foot and the skin is pale and shiny, and the hair's gone off my toes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Current smoker of about 20 cigarettes a day for many years
trigger_question_examples: Do you smoke, or have you in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I smoke about a pack a day, always have.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any regular blood-thinning or antiplatelet medicine
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines — anything for your heart or to thin the blood?
Do you take aspirin or any blood thinner?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on anything regular — no blood thinners, nothing like that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The foot is painful and cold but is NOT suddenly numb, tingling, or unable to move; the worsening came on over days rather than in a single sudden moment
trigger_question_examples: Is the foot numb or tingling, or can you still move your toes normally?
Did this come on all of a sudden, or has it built up?
Has the foot suddenly gone dead-cold or lost all feeling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still wiggle my toes and I can feel them — it's the pain that's the problem. It's got worse over the last couple of days, it didn't just happen all at once.
